content.text: {"version": "1", "description": "0/1 knapsack: 5 items.", "variables": [{"name": "x_0", "type": "binary", "description": "Item 0 selected (w=2, v=3)"}, {"name": "x_1", "type": "binary", "description": "Item 1 selected (w=3, v=4)"}, {"name": "x_2", "type": "binary", "description": "Item 2 selected (w=4, v=5)"}, {"name": "x_3", "type": "binary", "description": "Item 3 selected (w=5, v=8)"}, {"name": "x_4", "type": "binary", "description": "Item 4 selected (w=9, v=10)"}], "objective": {"sense": "maximize", "linear": {"x_0": 3, "x_1": 4, "x_2": 5, "x_3": 8, "x_4": 10}, "quadratic": {}}, "constraints": [{"label": "capacity", "type": "inequality_le", "linear": {"x_0": 2, "x_1": 3, "x_2": 4, "x_3": 5, "x_4": 9}, "quadratic": {}, "rhs": 20}], "test_instance": {"description": "Optimum: items {0,2,3,4} for value 26.", "expected_optimum": 26}}
